name: das-gateway-v3
description: OctoBus package for DAS Gateway V3 IP block and unblock APIs.

DAS_Gateway_V3.DAS_Gateway_V3/BlockIP.name: block-ip
DAS_Gateway_V3.DAS_Gateway_V3/BlockIP.description: Block IP addresses through DAS Gateway V3.

DAS_Gateway_V3.DAS_Gateway_V3/UnblockIP.name: unblock-ip
DAS_Gateway_V3.DAS_Gateway_V3/UnblockIP.description: Unblock an IP address through DAS Gateway V3.
